recommendations.title: Age of Heroes
recommendations.overview: The true story of the formation of Ian Fleming's 30 Commando unit, a precursor for the elite forces in the U.K.

recommendations.title: Journey's End
recommendations.overview: Set in a dugout in Aisne in 1918, a group of British officers, led by the mentally disintegrating young officer Stanhope, variously await their fate.

recommendations.title: The Burmese Harp
recommendations.overview: In Burma during the closing days of WWII, a Japanese soldier separated from his unit disguises himself as a Buddhist monk to escape imprisonment as a POW.

recommendations.title: A.C.A.B. - All Cops Are Bastards
recommendations.overview: A look at the controversial riot cops unit, told through the stories of three veteran cops and a young recruit.

recommendations.title: Johnny Got His Gun
recommendations.overview: A young American soldier, rendered in pseudocoma from an artillery shell from WWI, recalls his life leading up to that point.

recommendations.title: The White Sun of the Desert
recommendations.genres: Action, Drama, Romance, Comedy, Adventure, War
recommendations.overview: The setting is the east shore of the Caspian Sea (today's Turkmenistan) where the Red Army soldier Fyodor Sukhov has been fighting the Civil War in Russian Asia for a number of years. After being hospitalised and then demobbed, he sets off home to jo

recommendations.title: Monster Island
recommendations.overview: In the Pacific, 1944, a Japanese soldier and a British prisoner of war are stranded on a deserted island, hunted by a deadly creature. Two mortal enemies must come together to survive the unknown.

recommendations.title: Unicorn Wars
recommendations.overview: An army of bear cubs train and indoctrinate young recruits for the war against the unicorns, which threatens the safety of the cubs. Brothers Bluey and Tubby, along with a group of inexperienced cadets, are sent on a dangerous mission to save the Mag

recommendations.title: Sisu
recommendations.overview: When an ex-soldier who discovers gold in the Lapland wilderness tries to take the loot into the city, German soldiers led by a brutal SS officer battle him.

recommendations.title: Kajaki
recommendations.overview: British soldiers guarding the Kajaki Dam set out to rescue a three-man team after one of them loses a leg to a landmine.
